Docs.param: The name of the configuration section that contains the .
Docs.summary: Adds an that reads configuration values from Azure Key Vault. The is created from the specified configuration section using .
Docs.remarks: This method uses the Azure.Core configuration extensions (built on System.ClientModel) to create a from the specified configuration section. The section should contain the VaultUri and Credential properties. For more information, see Configuration and Dependency Injection for Azure SDK Clients.

Docs.param: The name of the configuration section that contains the .
An optional callback to configure the before the client is created.
Docs.summary: Adds an that reads configuration values from Azure Key Vault. The is created from the specified configuration section using . The callback can be used to modify the settings before the client is created.
Docs.remarks: This method uses the Azure.Core configuration extensions (built on System.ClientModel) to create a from the specified configuration section. The section should contain the VaultUri and Credential properties. For more information, see Configuration and Dependency Injection for Azure SDK Clients.
